generated.findings: Mild atherosclerosis, normal cardiac contours, and patchy opacity in left midlung.
generated.impression: No acute disease or cardiopulmonary abnormalities.
generated.recommendation: Further evaluation recommended to determine the cause of lung opacity.

ground_truth.findings: No acute osseous abnormalities. Left midlung, and basilar streaky opacity. There is elevation of the left hemidiaphragm. No pneumothorax. Small calcified 8 cm granuloma adjacent to the right diaphragm within the right chest. Cardiomediastinal silhouette is within normal limits.
ground_truth.impression: No acute osseous abnormalities. If continued clinical concern for rib fracture dedicated rib films will be helpful. Left midlung, and left basilar streaky opacity may represent atelectasis.
